title: 1.21.1 Create Extremely Optimised
description: Lightweight Create mod Based Fabric/NeoForge Modpack
body:
# Create: Extremely Optimised

Create: Extremely Optimised is a lightweight Modpack that is Build around the Create Mod.
It has your Favorite Add-ons and Building Mods while Still having an amazing Performance even Low-End Computers

Most Important Mods: 
Create + Add-ons (Steam n Rails, Big Cannons, Create Deco,      Crafts and Additions)

Naturalist,
Tom'S Simple Storage,
Storage Drawers,
Waystones,
Immersive Airplanes, Melodies and Paintings,
Sophisticated Backpacks,
Chipped,
Farmers Delight,    And more...

Note that the 1.21.1 NeoForge version is missing Naturalist, Immersive- Melodies, -Paintings and also all most all of the Create Addons.

Unleash your engineering genius without limits—smooth, fast, and extremely optimised with Create: Extremely Optimised! 🚀💡
